description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a hidden job template .test_template containing the script commands `make lint` and `npm t`. Add three jobs—test:node18, test:node20, and test:node22—each using the Docker images node:18, node:20, and node:22 respectively, inheriting the template script. Configure a cache with key `$CI_JOB_NAME` that stores the `node_modules/` directory and includes untracked files. All jobs run in the default `test` stage. No additional rules or artifacts are required.
